'''鈭歵-h-dh''' ('''shatahadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nailbrush|nailbrush]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nailbrush|nailbrush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| shatahadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitahadh|thitahadh]] || [[word:jitahadh|jitahadh]] || [[word:shitahadh|shitahadh]] || [[word:kitahadh|kitahadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutahadh|thuthutahadh]] || [[word:jujutahadh|jujutahadh]] || [[word:shushutahadh|shushutahadh]] || [[word:kukutahadh|kukutahadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutahadh|thutahadh]] || [[word:jutahadh|jutahadh]] || [[word:shutahadh|shutahadh]] || [[word:kutahadh|kutahadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutahadh|thutahadh]] || [[word:jutahadh|jutahadh]] || [[word:shutahadh|shutahadh]] || [[word:kutahadh|kutahadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetahadh|thetahadh]] || [[word:jetahadh|jetahadh]] || [[word:shetahadh|shetahadh]] || [[word:ketahadh|ketahadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotahadh|thothotahadh]] || [[word:jojotahadh|jojotahadh]] || [[word:shoshotahadh|shoshotahadh]] || [[word:kokotahadh|kokotahadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahadh|thotahadh]] || [[word:jotahadh|jotahadh]] || [[word:shotahadh|shotahadh]] || [[word:kotahadh|kotahadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahadh|thotahadh]] || [[word:jotahadh|jotahadh]] || [[word:shotahadh|shotahadh]] || [[word:kotahadh|kotahadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tahadh|th忙tahadh]] || [[word:j忙tahadh|j忙tahadh]] || [[word:sh忙tahadh|sh忙tahadh]] || [[word:k忙tahadh|k忙tahadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatahadh|thathatahadh]] || [[word:jajatahadh|jajatahadh]] || [[word:shashatahadh|shashatahadh]] || [[word:kakatahadh|kakatahadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatahadh|thatahadh]] || [[word:jatahadh|jatahadh]] || [[word:shatahadh|shatahadh]] || [[word:katahadh|katahadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatahadh|thatahadh]] || [[word:jatahadh|jatahadh]] || [[word:shatahadh|shatahadh]] || [[word:katahadh|katahadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatahadh|shatahadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatahadh|goshatahadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatahadh|gokishatahadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatahadhn眉|shatahadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkn眉|goshatahadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahadhn眉|gokishatahadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatahadhsh毛|shatahadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatahadhnksh毛|goshatahadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatahadhsh毛|gokishatahadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahadhro|shatahadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkro|goshatahadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahadhro|gokishatahadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahadhmu|shatahadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkmu|goshatahadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahadhmu|gokishatahadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatahadhsher|shatahadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatahadhnksher|goshatahadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatahadhsher|gokishatahadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatahadhng|shatahadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkng|goshatahadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatahadhng|gokishatahadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatahadhya|shatahadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkya|goshatahadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatahadhya|gokishatahadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatahadhyam|shatahadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkyam|goshatahadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatahadhyam|gokishatahadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahadhn眉sh毛|shatahadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkn眉sh毛|goshatahadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahadhn眉sh毛|gokishatahadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahadhn眉ro|shatahadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkn眉ro|goshatahadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahadhn眉ro|gokishatahadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahadhn眉mu|shatahadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkn眉mu|goshatahadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahadhn眉mu|gokishatahadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahadhsh毛n眉|shatahadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahadhnksh毛n眉|goshatahadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahadhsh毛n眉|gokishatahadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahadhsh毛ro|shatahadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahadhnksh毛ro|goshatahadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahadhsh毛ro|gokishatahadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahadhsh毛mu|shatahadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahadhnksh毛mu|goshatahadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahadhsh毛mu|gokishatahadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahadhron眉|shatahadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkron眉|goshatahadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahadhron眉|gokishatahadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahadhrosh毛|shatahadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkrosh毛|goshatahadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahadhrosh毛|gokishatahadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahadhromu|shatahadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkromu|goshatahadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahadhromu|gokishatahadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahadhmun眉|shatahadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkmun眉|goshatahadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahadhmun眉|gokishatahadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahadhmush毛|shatahadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkmush毛|goshatahadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahadhmush毛|gokishatahadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahadhmuro|shatahadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahadhnkmuro|goshatahadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahadhmuro|gokishatahadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
